title: erythroxylum zambesiacum
intro: Erythroxylum zambesiacum, also known as the Zambezi coca, is a plant species belonging to the Erythroxylum genus. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a local anesthetic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Erythroxylum zambesiacum include its potential to alleviate pain and reduce fever, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Erythroxylum zambesiacum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
